name: Create Transaction
description: Dispatch a transaction to the connected terminal. Returns an event_id immediately; the final result is delivered asynchronously.
details: The transaction is queued and processed by the terminal. Use the Check Status API or listen for webhook callbacks to get the final result.

bodyParams.name: amount
bodyParams.description: Transaction amount in smallest currency unit (paise).

bodyParams.name: transaction_type
bodyParams.description: Type of transaction: SALE, REFUND, VOID, PRE_AUTH.

bodyParams.name: reference_id
bodyParams.description: Your custom reference ID for tracking.

responses.description: Bad request – invalid or missing parameters.
Terminal is busy processing another transaction.
